subcodes.first_line: O concourse of the earth! By God, the Book hath appeared in the temple of man, and announceth unto you the appearance of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ملا الارض تالله ان الکتاب قد ظهر علی هیکل الانسان و یبشرکم بظهور الله و
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to the people of the world, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @station of the Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment
